hero.name: ARSENE!
hero.subtitle: An organised and dependable Full Stack developer with 3+ years of experience, passionate about building high-quality web, desktop & mobile solutions.

about.heading: Digitalizing
about.bio: I'm a Fullstack Web Developer and Odoo ERP Specialist based in Cameroon, with over 3 years of experience turning business needs into working software. I build websites, e-commerce platforms, and web/desktop/mobile applications using React, Next.js, Node.js, and PostgreSQL, and I design and integrate custom Odoo modules for businesses across retail, healthcare, and logistics. I'm also growing my data analytics skills with Power BI and Excel. Beyond client work, I mentor junior developers and enjoy taking on innovation challenges. I care about clean, maintainable code and solutions that actually move the needle for the people using them.

items.title: Software Developer
items.description: Websites, e-commerce platforms, web applications, desktop and mobile apps — built with modern frameworks for performance and scalability.

items.title: Odoo Developer
items.description: Custom module development, ERP integration and configuration tailored to your business processes and workflows.

items.title: Data Analyst
items.description: Business insights and reporting with Power BI dashboards and advanced Microsoft Excel analytics.

items.title: FullStack Web Developer
items.description: Designed 5+ websites with WordPress, GoDaddy Builder and Next.js. Developed a point-of-sale management application that improved business performance by 30%. Trained 10+ team members on digital tools.

items.title: Software Engineer | Odoo Developer
items.description: Developing and configuring custom Odoo modules for diverse freelance clients, including ERP integrations and local payment solutions.

items.title: Web Developer & IT Consultant
items.description: Built e-commerce applications with Python/Django and ERP modules with Laravel for bakeries, supermarkets and hospitals. Analyzed requirements for 6+ clients across various sectors.

items.title: E-commerce Platform for Cocoa Trade
items.description: Design and development of an e-commerce platform facilitating cocoa product trade between producers, cooperatives and buyers.

items.title: Auto-Invoicing App — Web & Desktop
items.description: Cross-platform invoicing solution enabling automatic quote/invoice generation, client management and payment tracking.

items.title: Odoo Local Payment Module — MoMo, OM, Bank Transfer
items.description: Native Odoo payment module integrating MTN Mobile Money, Orange Money and bank transfer, with MyCoolpay integration for secure real-time transactions.

items.title: Transit & Logistics Website
items.description: International transit and logistics web platform: shipment management, transport service showcase (air, sea, road) and parcel tracking.

contact.heading: Get In
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or just want to say hello? Drop me a message and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
